title: The next era of product building: Designing the workflows of the future
speakers: Yuhki Yamashita (Chief Product Officer, Figma), Kris Rasmussen (Chief Technology Officer, Figma), Loredana Crisan (Chief Design Officer, Figma)
key_points: A fireside-style conversation among Figma's three product leaders, CPO Yuhki Yamashita, CTO Kris Rasmussen, and CDO Loredana Crisan, on how AI is reshaping the way products are imagined, designed, and built.
Examines how teams are adapting their workflows to new ways of working as the software creation process changes alongside AI.
Considers what remains essential and enduring even as the workflows behind product building rapidly evolve.
Looks ahead to the next generation of product creation and the future workflows that will define it.
